parts.text: A blocked pull request tells you what failed. It rarely tells you what to do about it.
mergegate now answers that. Every gate that blocks the merge comes with an actionable fix — right in the terminal, and in the pull-request comment.

An agent's PR is blocked. Under each failing gate, mergegate prints a fix: reference a spec, or run the test command locally. The same steps land as a How to fix list on the PR. The agent follows them, and the gate goes green, exit zero.
mergegate. Provably done — and a clear way forward. From deemwar.

cards.title: BLOCKED tells you what failed.
cards.subtitle: not what to do about it

cards.title: Now it tells you how to fix it.
cards.subtitle: every blocking gate → an actionable next step

lines: Type "# an agent's PR hit the gate — what now?"

captions.text: Every blocking gate now carries a → fix: next step.
The markdown verdict adds a 'How to fix' list for the PR.
Agent follows the hints → ✔ PASS, exit 0.
